query:
SELECT ap.id as pdiId, ap.trilhaId, ap.status, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino,
       ac.id as compId, ac.competenciaId, ac.peso, ac.nivelAtual, ac.microInicio, ac.microTermino,
       c.nome as competenciaNome
FROM assessment_pdi ap
JOIN assessment_competencias ac ON ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id
JOIN competencias c ON c.id = ac.competenciaId
WHERE ap.alunoId = 30097
ORDER BY ap.trilhaId, ac.competenciaId;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT ap.id as pdiId, ap.trilhaId, ap.status, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino,
       ac.id as compId, ac.competenciaId, ac.peso, ac.nivelAtual, ac.microInicio, ac.microTermino,
       c.nome as competenciaNome
FROM assessment_pdi ap
JOIN assessment_competencias ac ON ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id
JOIN competencias c ON c.id = ac.competenciaId
WHERE ap.alunoId = 30097
ORDER BY ap.trilhaId, ac.competenciaId;
